Home.name: Fidèle Loffou
Home.title: Full-Stack Developer
Home.subtitle: Engineering high-precision digital ecosystems with a focus on impact, elegance, and technical excellence.

About.title: ABOUT ME
About.missionDesc: Transforming complex ideas into intuitive and high-performance digital products. My mission is to combine the art of design with the rigor of engineering to create experiences that leave a lasting impression and truly serve their users.
About.philDesc: I believe in clean, tested, and maintainable code. Architecture should not be an obstacle to speed, but rather the engine of controlled scalability. Permanent focus on performance (Core Web Vitals) and accessibility.
About.journeyDesc1: Passionate about computer science from a young age, I quickly oriented my path towards modern web development. My time at INNO-SOFT allowed me to understand the critical challenges of large-scale e-commerce.
About.journeyDesc2: Today at Londo Technology, I push the boundaries of TypeScript and Full-Stack architecture to build robust solutions that meet the strictest industry standards.

bio.intro: My name is Fidèle Loffou, a Full-Stack Web Developer passionate about creating high-precision digital solutions.
bio.detail1: Anchored in a culture of technical excellence, I support my clients towards robust architectures and exceptional interfaces.
bio.detail2: Expertise forged within demanding ecosystems like INNO-SOFT and Londo Technology.

fe.title: FRONTEND_CORE
fe.desc: Creating reactive interfaces and immersive user experiences with attention to detail.

be.title: BACKEND_LOGIC
be.desc: Designing robust APIs, managing scalable databases, and complex business logic.

devops.title: TOOLS_DEV_OPS
devops.desc: Automation, continuous deployment, and isolated development environments for maximum productivity.

londo.desc: Development and maintenance of high-performance web and mobile applications.
highlights: Design and optimization of APIs to improve service responsiveness.
Implementation of unit and functional tests to ensure software quality.
Continuous improvement of development processes within the technical team.

inno.desc: Project Manager and Trainer specializing in web and e-learning solutions.
highlights: Management of a school report management system development.
Analysis and design of tailored e-learning platforms and showcase sites.
Training teams on modern tech stacks and digital tools.

minpostel.desc: Management tool development for the Ministry (Internship).
highlights: Digitization of registrations for 'Vacances 100% TIC' national program.
Design of an automated administrative leave management system.

Projects.title: ENGINEERING SHOWCASE
Projects.subtitle: A curated collection of digital ecosystems where technical excellence meets strategic innovation. From high-security Fintech architectures to industrial-grade SFA solutions, each project is optimized for absolute performance and elite user experience.
Projects.label: SELECTED_PROJECT

cadyst.title: CLICK CADYST
cadyst.desc: Centralized management of internal flour bag orders for PASTA. Web, mobile app, and secure APIs with an intuitive interface. Available on Play Store.
cadyst.context: The company PASTA faced delays and manual errors in managing flour orders.

fly.title: FLY-BANKING & OPÉRATION VISA
fly.desc: Management system for bank limits for international transactions. Robust and secure APIs.
fly.context: Banking customers had to physically travel to increase their Visa card limits during travel.

panier.title: MON PANIER
panier.desc: Full e-commerce platform. Dynamic catalog, advanced cart system, and payment tracking.
panier.context: Need for a modern e-commerce platform capable of supporting seasonal peak loads.

cimencam.title: CIMENCAM SFA
cimencam.desc: Sales Force Automation platform for Cimencam. Digital transformation of the industrial distribution and sales tracking process.
cimencam.context: Cimencam, the leader in the cement industry in Cameroon, wanted to modernize the tracking of its sales operations in the field.
cimencam.problem: Manual sales tracking, lack of real-time visibility on agent performance, and tedious reporting processes.
cimencam.solution: Development of a robust SFA web application for real-time order tracking, customer portfolio management, and advanced performance analytics.

Footer.tagline: Building the future, one line of code at a time.
